'''Jendar''' was a planet located in the [[Nembus sector/Legends|Nembus sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it was the site of a [[Jendar Campaign|campaign]] between the forces of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for the control of the planet.<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|II|155|Jendar Campaign}}</ref>
